quotes: default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds

Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall. New icons are permitted but **must match this stylistic approach** (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work).
Icon colors and backgrounds adjustable **only within the brand palette**.
Consider scale and contrast for low-vision audiences. [GENERAL: minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds.]

rules.intent: Maintain icon style consistency and ensure visual accessibility for low-vision readers.
rules.rule_text: Icons must use a minimal line illustration style featuring consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, and single-color line work. Icon colors and backgrounds must stay within the brand palette, defaulting to Brand Blue strokes (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) on light backgrounds. For low-vision accessibility, icons must render at a minimum size of 32x32px in email (dimension.accessibility.icon_render_min = 32px).
